title: Title of purchaser from district
doc_html:
§1333.  Title of purchaser from district

In the sale of property by the Jefferson and Plaquemines Drainage District acquired by it at delinquent tax sale or from the register of the state land office, title to said property shall be free and clear of all liens or encumbrances of any kind or character.
doc_text:
§1333.  Title of purchaser from district
In the sale of property by the Jefferson and Plaquemines Drainage District acquired by it at delinquent tax sale or from the register of the state land office, title to said property shall be free and clear of all liens or encumbrances of any kind or character.
